name: Jersey City Firemen
description_short: Advanz Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative serving Kentucky and Indiana counties with competitive loan rates, savings accounts, and financial literacy programs.
description_long: Advanz Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union operating in Jefferson, Bullitt, Spencer, Shelby, Oldham, Henry, and Trimble Counties in Kentucky, as well as Clark and Floyd Counties in Indiana. The organization serves individuals and businesses in its membership area through a network of physical branches and online banking services. Advanz offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including auto loans, mortgages, credit cards, home equity lines of credit, and various savings products. The credit union distinguishes itself through competitive APR rates, community partnerships (notably with Northeast Family YMCA for youth financial literacy), and member benefits including discounts with local and national businesses. The organization demonstrates a commitment to financial education through programs like their annual Cadet Savers Newsletters featuring character education and the Youth Month Coloring Contest. Advanz emphasizes accessible, personalized service with member testimonials highlighting quick loan approval processes and professional customer support. For consumers in their service areas, Advanz represents a member-owned alternative to traditional banks with rates positioned competitively—auto loans as low as 4.74% APR, mortgages as low as 6.25% APR, and certificate products as high as 4.06% APY. The primary limitation is geographic restriction to specific Kentucky and Indiana counties, making membership unavailable to those outside the defined service territory.
services: Auto loans with rates as low as 4.74% APR
30-year mortgages with rates as low as 6.25% APR
Home equity lines of credit with closing cost assistance
Credit cards with rates as low as 9.90% APR
Debit cards with no monthly fees, instant alerts, and card controls
Savings accounts and high-yield certificates up to 4.06% APY
Certificates of Investment Account (CIA) and CCIA products up to 1.51% APY
Online account opening and loan applications
Member referral program with mutual rewards
Scholarship program (2026 Carl Rixman & Carl Hicks Memorial Scholarships—$1,000 each)
Youth financial literacy programs through Cadet Savers
Member discount partnerships with local and national businesses
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.74% APR
30-year mortgages available as low as 6.25% APR
No monthly fees on debit cards with instant alerts and card controls
Home equity line of credit with up to $750 in closing costs covered
Member referral program offering rewards to both referrer and new member
Community partnerships like Northeast Family YMCA for youth financial literacy
Quick loan approval with same-day funding (per member testimonials)
Certificate products offering up to 4.06% APY
cons: Membership limited to specific Kentucky and Indiana counties only—geographically restricted service area
Savings account APY relatively modest at only 0.15% APY
Credit card APR starting at 9.90% is higher than some competitors
Website content does not detail specific membership requirements or eligibility verification process
Limited information about mobile app functionality or digital banking features
best_for: Residents and businesses located in Jefferson, Bullitt, Spencer, Shelby, Oldham, Henry, or Trimble Counties in Kentucky
Employees and organizations in Clark or Floyd Counties in Indiana seeking member-owned financial institutions
Community-focused borrowers valuing credit unions with youth financial literacy programs
Auto and mortgage borrowers in the service area seeking competitive rates without monthly banking fees
diagnosis: Advanz Credit Union is best for residents and businesses in its Kentucky and Indiana service territories seeking member-owned, not-for-profit financial services with competitive lending rates and community involvement. The main caveat is strict geographic membership restrictions—this institution is completely unavailable to consumers outside its defined county service areas.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Jersey City Firemen (Jersey City, NJ) | CreditDoc
meta_description: Jersey City Firemen — NCUA-insured credit union in Jersey City, NJ. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
